positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration featuring a group of diverse, friendly woodland creatures (fox, owl, rabbit, deer) gathered under a crescent moon. The art style should be clean, vibrant watercolor mixed with bold linework, reminiscent of modern children's book illustrations. The composition must be centered and balanced, forming a clear silhouette against a deep indigo night sky filled with twinkling stars. Foreground elements should include oversized stylized mushrooms and curling ivy. Use a limited, rich color palette dominated by jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with creamy ivory highlights. The overall mood is magical, serene, and adventurous. Vector-like quality, perfect for apparel printing, isolated on a clean background or suitable for direct print placement.
negative: text, watermark, signature, blurry, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, grayscale, cartoonish, hyperrealistic, low contrast, cluttered, logo, copyrighted character
